title: Copilot
original_title: Die Welt wird eine andere sein
overview: Asli and Saeed fall in love in the mid-1990s. Although Asli’s mother is against their relationship, they secretly get married. Then he disappears. A sensitive love story that recounts how Saeed changes Asli’s life – before the entire world is shaken.

trailers.title: COPILOT (2021) | Canan Kir | Roger Azar | Anne Zohra Berrached
